name: tieba-scrape
description: Cross-platform Tieba forum scrape — search dictionary terms on Baidu Tieba, harvest forum threads and replies for evidence
note: BLOCKED: Baidu CAPTCHA on all thread detail pages (desktop /p/<id>, mobile /mo/q/m?kz=<id>, CDN c.tieba.baidu.com). Thread discovery works via mobile seekcomposite (10 threads/query with titles/IDs) but comment extraction returns HTTP 403 with '百度安全验证' JS challenge. Requires Baidu auth cookies or CAPTCHA solver. Code fixes to tiebaScraper.js (mobile URL, regex, fetchUrl) are correct and committed.
